rubric_metadata.name: Automaton Auditor Input Rubric
rubric_metadata.description: Binding law for detective, judge, and chief justice nodes

dimensions.name: LangGraph Architecture
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Validate START->Detectives fan-out, fan-in sync node, Judges fan-out, ChiefJustice synthesis.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Score 1 if linear graph; score high only with explicit fan-out and fan-in wiring.

dimensions.name: State Management Rigor
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Detect BaseModel classes, TypedDict AgentState, and reducers operator.add/operator.ior.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Downgrade when dict soup or overwrite risk appears.

dimensions.name: Forensic Accuracy
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Use AST parsing and safe subprocess tooling in temp directories.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Penalize regex-only structural validation and unsafe shell execution patterns.

dimensions.name: Documentation Depth
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Find dialectical synthesis, fan-in/fan-out, metacognition explanations with context.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Penalize buzzword stuffing without concrete architecture explanation.

dimensions.name: Citation Integrity
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Cross-check report-mentioned file paths against repository inventory.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Defense claims without evidence should be overruled.

dimensions.name: Visual Architecture
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Classify whether diagrams depict true parallel courtroom flow.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Penalize generic flowcharts that omit fan-out/fan-in details.

dimensions.name: Judicial Nuance
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Confirm judge personas are separate nodes with structured output enforcement.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Cap at 2 for free-text judge outputs.

dimensions.name: Synthesis Engine
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Verify deterministic, rule-based ChiefJustice with variance and dissent handling.

dimensions.name: Sandbox Safety
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Require tempfile + subprocess.run + return code checks in clone and git tools.

dimensions.name: Remediation Quality
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Check if remediations are file-level, specific, and actionable.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Penalize generic remediation text lacking exact file instructions.
